name: Yeedex Electronic Corporation
summary: Yeedex Electronic Corporation provides parts, materials, and sub-systems for semiconductor process equipment in Taiwan and China. The company offers fine ceramic parts and materials; perfluoroelastomer seals; precision vacuum chucks; refurbish and repair precious parts, including ESC, heaters, vacuum chucks, ceramic coatings, anodizing products, etc.; plasma coated chamber parts; quartz and others parts; tungsten carbide blades; and heat resistant phosphor plates. It also serves flat display panel, passive electronic component, LED, solar cell, automobile, medical, and special material industries. The company also exports its products to other Asian and American countries. Yeedex Electronic Corporation was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
